rulings.Case Title: MADELINE MORAN VS. DANIEL PATTERSON ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION Against Plaintiff
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday March 26, 2018, line 1. DEFENDANT DANIEL PATTERSON, MARY PATTERSON MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION Against Plaintiff DENIED. Moving party failed to comply with CRC 3.1350(b). Additionally triable issues of fact exists as to each cause of action and as to the statute of limitations. See Moran Declaration. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: UWE GUEHNEMANN VS. ARKADY BERGER ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday March 26, 2018, line 2. DEFENDANT ARKADY BERGER, NINEL MERZHERITSKY MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD OFF CALENDAR, insufficient notice per CCP 1005 and CCP 1013. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. SMADAR LAVIE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Declare Plaintiff The Prevailing Party In This Unlawful Detainer
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday March 26, 2018, line 3. PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY Notice Of Motion To Declare Plaintiff The Prevailing Party In This Unlawful Detainer DENIED. There is no prevailing party in this action. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: TATIANA KOGAN VS. NOEL YESCAS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT / Notice Of And Motion For Summary Judgment; Plaintiff Counsel Declarations; Request For Judicial Notice In Support Of Notice Of And Motion For Summary Judgment; Memorandum Of Points & Authorities In Support Of Motion For Summary Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday March 26, 2018, line 4. PLAINTIFF TATIANA KOGAN MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT / Notice Of And Motion For Summary Judgment Hearing Required. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Compel Deft'S Responses To Discovery, Production Of Docs And For An Award Of Monetary Sanctions Against Deft And/Or Her Counsel Of Record

rulings.Case Title: OELSNER COMMERCIAL PROPERTIES VS. ALIPHCOM, INC. ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday March 26, 2018, line 6. DEFENDANT JAWBONE HEALTH HUB, INC. DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges a cause of action for unlawful detainer. = (501/REQ)
